configurations.name: Jekyll Preview (Podman)
configurations.command: podman machine start >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && podman run --rm -it --platform linux/amd64 -p 4000:4000 -v "${workspaceFolder}":/srv/jekyll -v jekyll-gems:/usr/gem docker.io/jekyll/jekyll:pages sh -lc "gem list -i webrick >/dev/null || gem install webrick --no-document; jekyll serve --host 0.0.0.0 --livereload --force_polling --future"
